email_subject: Application for Warehouse Employee - Dayshift - Lokeren
email_body:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to apply for the Warehouse Employee - dayshift position in Lokeren, as advertised by AGO Jobs & HR. With recent experience in a high-volume logistics environment at Katoen Natie, I am accustomed to maintaining accuracy and efficiency while handling goods. I am comfortable with physical work, can remain calm under pressure, and have a good overview of tasks. I communicate perfectly in English and am available for the 08:00-16:15 shift. I am eager to bring my reliability and strong work ethic to your team.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how I can contribute.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to apply for the Warehouse Employee - dayshift position in Lokeren, as advertised by AGO Jobs & HR. With hands-on experience in logistics and a strong commitment to accuracy and efficiency, I am confident I can contribute effectively to your team.

In my recent role at Katoen Natie, I worked in a fast-paced, high-volume warehouse environment where I maintained precision in handling goods and ensured smooth operations. This experience taught me to stay calm under pressure, keep a clear overview of tasks, and follow processes meticulously. I am comfortable with physical work, including checking deliveries, registering data, preparing packaging, picking orders, and maintaining a clean workstation.

I communicate fluently in English and am available to work the day shift from 08:00 to 16:15. I am reliable, punctual, and eager to learn. While my background includes digital marketing and web development, I am fully committed to this warehouse role and ready to apply my discipline and attention to detail to logistics tasks.

I am enthusiastic about the opportunity to join your company and contribute to its success. Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to hearing from you.

Sincerely,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
Warehouse & Logistics experience at Katoen Natie (2025-2026) maintaining accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced environment
Perfect English communication skills (professional level)
Comfortable with physical work and maintaining a clear overview under pressure
Available for day shift (08:00-16:15) and based in Zwijndrecht, near Lokeren
Reliable, punctual, and quick to learn new processes
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Reliable and hardworking warehouse professional with hands-on experience in high-volume logistics at Katoen Natie. Skilled in maintaining accuracy and efficiency while handling goods, checking deliveries, and preparing shipments. Communicates perfectly in English and remains calm under pressure. Available for day shift (08:00-16:15) and eager to contribute to a smooth warehouse operation.

CORE SKILLS
- Warehouse operations: checking deliveries, registering data, preparing packaging, order picking, workstation maintenance
- Accuracy and efficiency in fast-paced environments
- Calm under pressure with strong overview of tasks
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)
- Additional: SEO & GEO, Content & CMS, Web & build, Analytics & reporting, Social media

EXPERIENCE

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
